/api/vendor/profile
Post
- token in authentication bearer
- vendor id

Response
{
    success: true,
    message: "success",
    data: {
        id: "<vendor id>",
        name: "<vendor name>",
        number: "<vendor number>",
        storeName: "<vendor store name>",
        Address: "<vendor address>",
        email: "<vendor email>",
        BusinessType: "<vendor business type>",
        Description: "<vendor description>",
        geolocation: "<vendor geolocation>",
        Pan file: "<vendor pan file>"
    }
}
